audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:S + ăn + N]]. Use ăn before food to say what someone eats.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:S + ăn + N]]: Ăn is introduced as a transitive consumption verb with a food-denoting nominal complement.

audienceSections.normal:
#### S + ăn + N

Use ăn before food to say what someone eats. Example: [[grammar:Maria Garcia ăn bún.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### S + ăn + N

Ăn is introduced as a transitive consumption verb with a food-denoting nominal complement. Literal example: [[grammar:Maria Garcia ăn bún.]]

audienceSections.normal: Ăn is used directly before food nouns. Cơm continues its earlier cooked-rice/meal context without becoming a new lexical sense here.
audienceSections.expert: Ăn is used directly before food nouns. Cơm continues its earlier cooked-rice/meal context without becoming a new lexical sense here. The grammar IDs remain distinct and cumulative.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Maria Garcia ở nhà hàng.]] — Maria Garcia is at a restaurant.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà ở nhà hàng.]] — Trần Thu Hà is at the restaurant.
- [[grammar:Maria Garcia gọi món.]] — Maria Garcia orders food.
- [[grammar:Maria Garcia ăn bún.]] — Maria Garcia eats rice noodles.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà ăn cơm.]] — Trần Thu Hà eats rice.
- [[grammar:Maria Garcia ăn rau.]] — Maria Garcia eats vegetables.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà ăn thịt.]] — Trần Thu Hà eats meat.
- [[grammar:Maria Garcia không ăn cá.]] — Maria Garcia does not eat fish.
- [[grammar:Bữa tối rất ngon.]] — Dinner is very tasty.
